title: CLI call sites pass root to resolveSessionId so single-live-session adoption reaches claim-next and reservations
action: skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs: cell 1710-5 added root-aware single-live-session adoption to claims.resolveSessionId/claimCellFile, but the CLI-level call sites that hard-refuse on a null session id still resolve WITHOUT root, so a solo native Codex session is still refused at bee cells claim-next (handleCellsClaimNext ~L1123-1128) and at the reservations path. Fix: every bee.mjs call site that resolves a session id for a mutation (claim, claim-next, reservations reserve/release, state session bind, lane start if applicable) passes the resolved repo root so the adoption fallback applies; refusal messages stay unchanged for the 2+-fresh-sessions case. Keep 1710-3's restructured atomic reserve section intact (build on current HEAD). Tests: templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs or test_cli_cells.mjs — a sessionless claim-next with exactly one fresh live session succeeds (adopted), with two fresh sessions still refuses SESSION_REQUIRED.

truths: Sessionless claim-next with one fresh live session succeeds via adoption
Two fresh live sessions still refuse at claim-next
prohibitions: Do not change refusal semantics for genuinely ambiguous multi-session cases
Do not revert 1710-3's atomic reserve section

verify: env -u CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID -u BEE_SESSION_ID node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && env -u CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID -u BEE_SESSION_ID node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_cli_cells.mjs

trace.outcome: CLI call sites now thread root into resolveSessionId at claim-next (bee.mjs handleCellsClaimNext) and reservations reserve (reservations.mjs reserve()), so the durable single-live-session adoption fallback from cell 1710-5 reaches both — a solo native Codex session (real session record, no env var) now adopts instead of refusing; two-or-more fresh live sessions still refuse unchanged.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs (existing claim-next --session-id/env fallback test, ~line 2703)",
    "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_cli_cells.mjs (claimNextCell library-level suite)"
  ],
  "tests_added": [
    "test_bee_cli.mjs: bee cells claim-next: sessionless call with exactly ONE fresh live session record adopts it (no --session-id, no env)",
    "test_bee_cli.mjs: bee cells claim-next: sessionless call with TWO fresh live session records still refuses (real ambiguity, unchanged)",
    "test_bee_cli.mjs: bee reservations reserve: sessionless call with exactly ONE fresh live session record adopts it",
    "test_bee_cli.mjs: bee reservations reserve: sessionless call with TWO fresh live session records still refuses SESSION_REQUIRED"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before the fix, spawning bee.mjs 'cells claim-next --worker w --json' in an isolated temp repo with a single live .bee/sessions/<id>.json record (via claims.mjs createSession) and CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID/BEE_SESSION_ID both stripped from env exited status=1, stdout {\"error\":\"claim-next: --session-id or CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID env is required.\"} -- matching the cell's described bug. Same conditions against reservations.mjs's reserve(root,{agent,cell,path}) directly returned {ok:false, code:'SESSION_REQUIRED'} because isConcurrentMode(root), called without excludeSessionId, counted the solo session's own live heartbeat record as 'another' session.",
  "verification_run": "After the fix (root threaded into resolveSessionId at both call sites): claim-next adopts the sole live session (trace.claim_session equals that session's id) and reserve() adopts it too (reservation.session equals that session's id). A second repro with TWO live session records in the same checkout still refuses at both call sites unchanged (claim-next: same plain-text refusal; reserve: typed SESSION_REQUIRED). Full suite: env -u CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID -u BEE_SESSION_ID node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs => 225 passed, 0 failed; env -u CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID -u BEE_SESSION_ID node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_cli_cells.mjs => 24 passed, 0 failed."
}
trace.verify_output: 225 passed, 0 failed (test_bee_cli.mjs) then 24 passed, 0 failed (test_cli_cells.mjs); includes 4 new tests: claim-next solo-session adopts, claim-next two-session still refuses, reservations reserve solo-session adopts, reservations reserve two-session still refuses SESSION_REQUIRED
trace.verify_command: env -u CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID -u BEE_SESSION_ID node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && env -u CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID -u BEE_SESSION_ID node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_cli_cells.mjs
